/usr/bin/clang++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main1.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o main1  thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-graphics.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-window.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-system.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon thirdParty/SFML/lib/libharfbuzz.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libfreetype.a
